communications.subject: Arizona Public Records Law Request: Preschool Development Grant data
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Arizona Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Databases or information related to the Preschool Development Grant, including the Infant-Toddler Startup/Expansion Subgrant in Arizona. Specifically, for each grant recipient, I request the following information at the grant-to-provider level, as available:

1) Provider name 
2) Provider license ID
3) Employer identification number (EIN) if nonprofit provider
4) Employer identification number (EIN) if for-profit provider
5) Street number
6) Street name
7) City
8) Zip code
9) Grant application date (separately for each grant round, if applicable)
10) Grant application submitted date (separately for each grant round)
11) Grant awarded date (separately for each grant round)
12) Grant payment date, if differs from the awarded date (separately for each grant round)
13) Grant award amount (separately for each grant round)
14) Indicator for meets poverty criteria, e.g., low-income community or high percent of students eligible for Free and Reduced lunch (separately for each grant round)
15) Indicator for meets Opportunity Zone criteria (separately for each grant round)
16) Indicator for meets rural/tribal census tract criteria (separately for each grant round)
17) Indicator for meets performance data criteria, e.g., ELA or Early Childhood Assessment (separately for each grant round)
18) Indicator for meets 25% preschool gap criteria (separately for each grant round)
19) Indicator for meets capacity to serve infants/toddlers criteria (separately for each grant round)
20) Grant application score (separately for each grant round)
21) Any other variables that factor into the grant scoring criteria or the calculation that determines the awarded amount (separately for each grant round)
22) All of the above items 1-21 for rejected grant applications 

If available, I also am requesting information on the process of applying for the grants, information on the process of allocating the grants including the grant formula, and information on any other grants available to providers from the state.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Gabrielle Pepin

communications.subject: Colorado Open Records Act Request: Child care grant data
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Colorado Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Databases or information related to the Emerging and Expanding Grants in Colorado. Specifically, for each grant recipient, I request the following information at the grant-to-provider level, as available:

1) Provider name 
2) Provider license ID
3) Employer identification number (EIN) if nonprofit provider
4) Employer identification number (EIN) if for-profit provider
5) Street number
6) Street name
7) City
8) Zip code
9) Provider type, i.e., Family Child Care provider or Center
9) Grant application date (separately for each grant round/cohort, if applicable)
10) Grant application submitted date (separately for each grant round/cohort)
11) Grant awarded date (separately for each grant round/cohort)
12) Grant payment date, if differs from the awarded date (separately for each grant round/cohort)
13) Grant award amount (separately for each grant round/cohort)
14) Grant application score (separately for each grant round/cohort)
15) Number of slots being added (separately for each grant round/cohort)
16) Number of new slots being added for infants/toddlers (separately for each grant round/cohort)
17) Indicator for meets underserved community criteria (separately for each grant round/cohort)
18) Indicator for meets child care desert criteria (separately for each grant round/cohort)
19) Any other variables that factor into the grant scoring criteria or the calculation that determines the awarded amount (separately for each grant round/cohort)
20) All of the above items 1-19 for rejected grant applications

If available, I also am requesting information on the process of applying for the grants, information on the process of allocating the grants including the grant formula, and information on any other grants available to providers from the state.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Gabrielle Pepin
